description: WordPress REST API endpoints used by this portfolio. Set WP_BASE_URL in App.tsx to your WordPress domain.

blog_listing.description: Fetch latest 9 published posts with embedded featured image and author

single_post_by_slug.description: Fetch single post by slug (returns array, use [0])

acf_options.description: ACF Options Page values (requires ACF PRO or ACF to REST API plugin)

contact_form_submission.description: Submit contact form via Contact Form 7 REST API

required_wordpress_plugins: Advanced Custom Fields (ACF) - free or PRO
ACF to REST API (free) - to expose ACF options via REST
Contact Form 7 - for contact form submissions

cors_setup.description: Add this to your WordPress theme's functions.php to allow REST API calls from external domains
cors_setup.code: add_action('rest_api_init', function() { remove_filter('rest_pre_serve_request', 'rest_send_cors_headers'); add_filter('rest_pre_serve_request', function($value) { header('Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *'); header('Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, OPTIONS'); header('Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true'); return $value; }); }, 15);
